# HummingDeck Reviews --- Discover what people think of this product. {#hummingdeck-reviews-discover-what-people-think-of-this-product. .mt-2 .text-start .text-xs .text-gray-600 .dark:text-white .font-light .whitespace-wrap .max-w-xs}
:::

::: {.px-3 .xl:ml-4 .xl:mr-8 .flex .flex-col .w-100 .lg:w-full .max-w-2xl .lg:max-w-2xl .items-center .2xl:items-center .mt-4 .2xl:mt-8}
::: {.flex .flex-col .w-100 .lg:w-full .lg:max-w-2xl .2xl:items-center}
::: {.flex .flex-col .gap-y-2 .md:flex-row .h-full .w-full .md:justify-between .items-start .md:items-start .py-4 .lg:pt-4 .lg:pb-2 .rounded-lg}
::: {.flex .flex-row .h-full .items-start .shrink-0}
![Hummin](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwild-dust-0517.microlaunch.workers.dev%2Flogos-001%2Fhummingdeck%2Flogo.png&w=128&q=75){.rounded-md
.text-xs .hover:bg-opacity-80 .hover:-110 .hover:cursor-pointer
.transition .border .shadow-lg .dark:bg-white loading="lazy" width="48"
height="48" decoding="async" nimg="1" style="color:transparent"
srcset="/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwild-dust-0517.microlaunch.workers.dev%2Flogos-001%2Fhummingdeck%2Flogo.png&w=64&q=75 1x, /_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwild-dust-0517.microlaunch.workers.dev%2Flogos-001%2Fhummingdeck%2Flogo.png&w=128&q=75 2x"}

::: {.flex .flex-col}
## HummingDeck {#hummingdeck .ml-4 .text-base .text-gray-800 .dark:text-white .text-start .font-extrabold .w-full .whitespace-nowrap}

Share documents with tracking. Built-in digital sales rooms.

::: {.mt-3 .mb-2 .ml-4 .flex .flex-col .items-start .justify-start}
[[Visit Website]{.bg-indigo-500 .hover:bg-indigo-600 .px-4 .py-2
.font-semibold .text-white .rounded-lg .text-xs .py-1 .cursor-pointer
.whitespace-nowrap}](https://hummingdeck.com?ref=microlaunch){target="_blank"
rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.justify-start .md:justify-end .ml-0 .lg:ml-8 .w-80 .flex-wrap .shrink-0 .flex .flex-row .gap-x-0.5 .gap-y-1}
[[Marketing & Growth]{.ml-1 .px-3 .bg-pink-100 .text-pink-600
.dark:bg-[#ed1170] .dark:text-white .rounded-full .text-xs .py-1
.whitespace-nowrap}](/category/marketing)[Saas]{.ml-1 .px-3 .bg-gray-100
.text-gray-600 .dark:bg-gray-800 .dark:text-gray-200 .rounded-full
.text-xs .py-1 .whitespace-nowrap}[Subscription]{.ml-1 .px-3
.bg-gray-100 .text-gray-600 .dark:bg-gray-800 .dark:text-gray-200
.rounded-full .text-xs .py-1 .whitespace-nowrap}
:::
:::

::: {.2xl:px-3 .w-full}
::: {.w-full .mt-2 .mb-1 .whitespace-pre-line .flex-wrap .shrink-0 .text-xs .text-gray-700 .dark:text-gray-200 .text-start .font-normal style="border:initial;padding:initial;font-family:inherit"}
**HummingDeck** lets you share proposals, decks, and documents via
tracked links. See who opened what, which pages they read, and how long
they spent. Get notified the moment someone views your content. Group
documents into digital sales rooms with tabs, embedded videos, forms,
and mutual action plans. Three-layer bot detection filters out email
scanners so every view is a real person. Free plan available.
:::
:::

::: {.pt-6 .w-full .flex .justify-center}
![hero-img](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwild-dust-0517.microlaunch.workers.dev%2Fhero-001%2Fhummingdeck%2Fog-image.png&w=1920&q=100){.object-cover
.w-full .max-w-sm .justify-center .xs:max-w-md .lg:max-w-md .h-56
.rounded-lg .shadow-lg loading="lazy" width="2048" height="1024"
decoding="async" nimg="1" style="color:transparent"
srcset="/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwild-dust-0517.microlaunch.workers.dev%2Fhero-001%2Fhummingdeck%2Fog-image.png&w=1920&q=100 1x"}
:::
:::

::: {.w-full .flex .flex-row .justify-center .px-4 .mt-4 .items-center .pb-4}
::: {.pt-1 .w-full .flex .flex-row .items-center .justify-center}
::: {.w-full .flex .flex-row .items-center .whitespace-nowrap .bg-gray-50 .text-gray-400 .hover:text-gray-600 .dark:bg-gray-900 .dark:text-gray-500 .dark:hover:text-gray-300 .font-semibold .rounded-lg .text-xs .px-3 .py-2.5}
Signup to Vote
![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,){.lucide
.lucide-triangle .ml-1 .w-2 .h-2 .fill-gray-700 .dark:fill-gray-200}
:::

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,){.lucide
.lucide-circle-help .ml-2 .w-4 .h-4 .text-gray-500 .cursor-pointer}
:::
:::

::: {.w-full .flex .flex-col .mb-2 .xl:mb-8 .lg:max-w-2xl .mt-2 .pb-4 .xl:pb-8}
## What users think of HummingDeck {#what-users-think-of-hummingdeck .mb-2 .w-full .justify-start .text-gray-700 .dark:text-gray-200 .text-sm .w-24 .text-start .font-semibold .whitespace-nowrap}

::: {.text-sm .text-gray-500 .border .border-gray-200 .dark:border-gray-700 .pb-2 .rounded-md .w-full}
::: {.mt-1 .pt-2.5 .pb-3 .px-4 .lg:px-4 .flex .flex-col .gap-y-1 .lg:max-w-2xl .w-full}
::: {.flex .flex-row .flex-wrap .w-full .mt-1 .justify-between}

Maker

![Ilya](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOLq2UG-1ZRTrRC5SS4QXovIL_jbSVPg879DNKk4LoHe5MGw0=s96-c){.w-7
.h-7 .rounded-full width="28"
height="28"}[Ilya](https://twitter.com/hummingdeck){.ml-2
.whitespace-nowrap .text-gray-600 .font-medium .dark:text-gray-200
.text-xs target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}

height="20"}![maker](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIIuBfjpw0prqCMbMQBpxUnLnq2CgAcGA30g7xTSxGHJrEaL-Sl=s96-c){.w-5

height="20"}![maker](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1891564978177454080/YzRSDzkw_normal.jpg){.w-5
.h-5 .rounded-full width="20"
height="20"}![maker](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1707700070563315712/i0PTGVy7_normal.jpg){.w-5
.h-5 .rounded-full width="20" height="20"}[+1]{.whitespace-nowrap
.text-gray-500 .font-medium .dark:text-gray-200 .text-xs}

:::

## Tags {#tags .mt-4 .w-full .justify-start .text-gray-700 .dark:text-gray-200 .text-sm .w-24 .text-start .font-semibold .whitespace-nowrap}

::: {.mt-2 .flex .flex-row .gap-x-1 .gap-y-1 .items-center .w-full .flex-wrap}
[digital sales rooms](/tag/digital%20sales%20rooms){.w-fit .font-normal
.text-xs .text-center .line-clamp-1 .px-3 .py-1 .rounded-full
.text-gray-600 .dark:text-gray-300 .bg-gray-100 .dark:bg-gray-800
.hover:bg-gray-200 .dark:hover:bg-gray-700 .transition-colors
.duration-150}[sales enablement](/tag/sales%20enablement){.w-fit
.font-normal .text-xs .text-center .line-clamp-1 .px-3 .py-1
.rounded-full .text-gray-600 .dark:text-gray-300 .bg-gray-100
.dark:bg-gray-800 .hover:bg-gray-200 .dark:hover:bg-gray-700
.transition-colors .duration-150}[document
sharing](/tag/document%20sharing){.w-fit .font-normal .text-xs
.text-center .line-clamp-1 .px-3 .py-1 .rounded-full .text-gray-600
.dark:text-gray-300 .bg-gray-100 .dark:bg-gray-800 .hover:bg-gray-200
.dark:hover:bg-gray-700 .transition-colors .duration-150}[lead
engagement](/tag/lead%20engagement){.w-fit .font-normal .text-xs
.text-center .line-clamp-1 .px-3 .py-1 .rounded-full .text-gray-600
.dark:text-gray-300 .bg-gray-100 .dark:bg-gray-800 .hover:bg-gray-200
.dark:hover:bg-gray-700 .transition-colors .duration-150}[document
tracking](/tag/document%20tracking){.w-fit .font-normal .text-xs
.text-center .line-clamp-1 .px-3 .py-1 .rounded-full .text-gray-600
.dark:text-gray-300 .bg-gray-100 .dark:bg-gray-800 .hover:bg-gray-200
.dark:hover:bg-gray-700 .transition-colors .duration-150}[proposal
sharing](/tag/proposal%20sharing){.w-fit .font-normal .text-xs
.text-center .line-clamp-1 .px-3 .py-1 .rounded-full .text-gray-600
.dark:text-gray-300 .bg-gray-100 .dark:bg-gray-800 .hover:bg-gray-200
.dark:hover:bg-gray-700 .transition-colors .duration-150}
:::

## Product Categories {#product-categories .mt-6 .w-full .justify-start .text-gray-700 .dark:text-gray-200 .text-sm .w-24 .text-start .font-semibold .whitespace-nowrap}

::: {.p-4 .rounded-xl .shadow-lg .border .dark:border-gray-600 .dark:bg-gray-800}
[![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,){.lucide
.lucide-list .w-3 .h-3 .mr-2}
More [Marketing]{.font-medium} Products](/category/marketing){.flex
.flex-row .items-center .text-xs .text-gray-800 .dark:text-gray-100
.hover:opacity-80}
:::

::: {.flex .flex-col .w-full}
## Related Tasks {#related-tasks .mt-8 .w-full .justify-start .text-gray-700 .dark:text-gray-200 .text-sm .w-24 .text-start .font-semibold .whitespace-nowrap}

::: {.flex .flex-col .mt-4 .ml-12}
-   [How to track who opens and reads your sales proposals and
    documents](/h/how-to-track-who-opens-and-reads-your-sales-proposals-and-documents){.text-indigo-600
    .dark:text-blue-500 .hover:opacity-80}
-   [How to create a digital sales room with multiple documents and
    interactive
    elements](/h/how-to-create-a-digital-sales-room-with-multiple-documents-and-interactive-elements){.text-indigo-600
    .dark:text-blue-500 .hover:opacity-80}
-   [How to get real-time notifications when prospects view your shared
    content](/h/how-to-get-real-time-notifications-when-prospects-view-your-shared-content){.text-indigo-600
    .dark:text-blue-500 .hover:opacity-80}
:::
:::
:::
:::
